┌─ Assistant ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                                                                  │
│ The configuration file at config/database.yml has a connection   │
│ pool size of 5. For your expected load (200 req/s) I recommend  │
│ increasing it to at least 20.                                    │
│                                                                  │
│ Steps:                                                           │
│   1. Edit config/database.yml                                    │
│   2. Set pool: 20                                                │
│   3. Restart the application server                              │
│                                                                  │
